messages.body: When did you last see Mara Venn alive?
About 22:17. She asked me to unlatch the archive alcove because she wanted one more look at something before going upstairs to the board room. She was carrying her recorder tote and a paper folder.
What state was Studio B in at that point?
Dark. Engineering had already killed the booth power. I noticed because the red breaker tag was still hanging in the corridor and nobody was allowed to use the room.
No. I came back with a step stool a few minutes later and the alcove lamp was still on, but Mara was gone. Her tote wasn't there either.
